WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $517.95 AS TO DEFENDANT FELCYN GLORIA H DBA LA BAMBA CARIBBEAN RESTAURANT SUAREZ, IVAN DBA LA BAMBA CARIBBEAN RESTAURANT
